1. Goto the game webpage:  
`https://tds-network-games.sanand.workers.dev/detective/`

2. Open the `Network` tab by pressing `F12` key.

3. The tab will have the `detective` and `session` responses. Copy and save them.

4. Enter the email in the input box and click `Start`. Now, `start` response should also come.

5. Feed all the files and an SS of the game to any AI and put the codes in `Console`. Use BFS method if required.

6. If found the compromised node and the path to the node, go to the `Submit` block.

7. Enter the compromised node and the path to this node in the two input boxes and click `Submit`.

8. Copy the JWT Token which would appear at the bottom of the screen. This is the required Token.


Completion JWT Token:-  
```
eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..4gI6obMx76Zt7Zawr3iL76h0embAIoTqgw4_gqHkRnXNej-VjnntKTpL4s8bdWbnAyOFnYzza4UfeyRr8BoZ5A
```
